goal: The audience should feel the gap between hunter and hunted shrink metre by metre, until one drift decides it.

facts.text: Two supercars thread night traffic on an elevated expressway
facts.visual_hint: two low silhouettes weaving between taillights

facts.text: The orange car dives into a tunnel with the silver car closing
facts.visual_hint: tunnel lights strobing over carbon and glass

facts.text: The silver car feints outside and cuts inside on the tunnel exit curve
facts.visual_hint: drift line crossing under the other car

facts.text: The silver car emerges ahead as both hit the open bridge
facts.visual_hint: positions swapped at the tunnel mouth

world_facts.light: sodium tunnel strobes, city glow, taillight streaks
world_facts.road: dry asphalt, elevated expressway into tunnel curve

hook.action: Two supercars weave through sparse night traffic, the silver car surging up to the orange car's rear wing
hook.ending_frame: Both cars dive toward the tunnel mouth nose to tail

escalation.action: Tunnel lights strobe over both bodies as the silver car feints outside, the gap between them closing to nothing
escalation.ending_frame: The silver car's nose swings hard toward the inside line

payoff.action: The silver car drifts across the exit curve, crossing under the orange car and emerging ahead onto the open bridge
payoff.ending_frame: Positions swapped, both cars flare out of the tunnel into the city glow

conflicts.description: the orange car holding the line ahead, nose to tail
the tunnel exit curve leaving room for only one line

motifs.label: the closing gap between the cars

constraints.rule: visible in or around the cars
with the gap between them readable

hero_moment.description: The silver car crosses under the orange car mid-drift and emerges ahead, both flaring out of the tunnel into the city glow

energy_curve.reason: the silver car surges up to the orange car's rear wing
the gap closes to nothing under strobing tunnel light
